zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia de Englefield於1404年出生在英國奧可福爾利可特時，她的父親Nicholas de Englefield26歲，母親Joane de Rycote24歲。她於1419年與Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House在英國奧可福爾利可特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1447年在英國奧可福爾沃特斯東可享年43歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾沃特斯東可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia de Englefield于1404年出生在英国奧可福爾利可特时，她的父亲Nicholas de Englefield26岁，母亲Joane de Rycote24岁。她于1419年与Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House在英国奧可福爾利可特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1447年在英国奧可福爾沃特斯東可享年43岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾沃特斯東可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Englefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Englefield (in Berks and Surrey).  Compare  Inglefield  .

variants.name: Inglefield
meanings: English: locative name from Englefield (Surrey), recorded as Ingelfeld in 1282, or Englefield (Berks).

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia de Englefield was born in 1404, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Nicholas de Englefield, was 26 and her mother, Joane de Rycote, was 24. She married Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House in 1419, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1447, in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia d’Englefield est née en 1404, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas d’Englefield, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joane de Rycote, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House en 1419, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1447, à Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia de Englefield 1404 in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas de Englefield 26 und ihre Mutter Joane de Rycote 24. Sie hat 1419 in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1447 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Englefield è nata il nel 1404 nel Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Nicholas de Englefield, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joane de Rycote, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House nel 1419, nel Rycote, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1447, nel Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Englefieldが1404年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Englefieldは26歳，母Joane de Rycoteは24歳であった。1419年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトでSir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle Houseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1447年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアワテルストックで43歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアワテルストックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Englefield(이)가 1404년 영국 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas de Englefield(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane de Rycote(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 영국 스퍼드실르 왓르스톡에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 왓르스톡에 묻혔다.

mn.Rycote, Oxfordshire, England: Rycote, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Englefield nasceu em 1404, em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Englefield, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Rycote, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House em 1419, em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1447, em Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia de Englefield родилась в 1404 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas de Englefield было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Rycote, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House в 1419 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1447 г. в местности вэитирстокк, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности вэитирстокк, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia de Englefield nació en 1404, en Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas de Englefield, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joane de Rycote, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House en 1419, en Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1447, en Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
